changes.title: Animated avatar rings
changes.description: 9 ring styles — None, Glow, Pulse, Fire, Neon, Aura, Spin, Rainbow, and Sparks — can be set from the Style tab. Spin, Rainbow, Fire and Sparks use a rotating conic-gradient rendered via an .av-ring-wrap wrapper div around every chat avatar. Glow, Pulse, Neon and Aura animate using box-shadow keyframes directly. The chosen ring is saved to profile.json and displayed to all other users in every room and closet.

changes.title: Particle canvas on your header avatar
changes.description: Selecting the Sparks ring spawns a requestAnimationFrame canvas positioned over your header avatar button. Coloured dots orbit the avatar continuously. Switching to any other ring removes the canvas and stops the animation loop.

changes.title: Status emoji beside your chat name
changes.description: Pick one of 15 status emojis (🔥 ⭐ 👑 ⚡ 💎 and more) from the Style tab. The emoji appears next to your sender name in chat for everyone to see. It is stored in profile.json and loaded asynchronously the first time your messages are rendered, then retroactively added to any existing name spans already in the DOM.

changes.title: Per-room custom backgrounds
changes.description: The Style tab now shows a Room Background section when you are inside a group room. Choose from 9 gradient presets (Night, Forest, Ocean, Rose, Ember, Cyber, Soft, Ash, or Default). The selection is stored locally under cp2p_room_bg_{roomName} and applied every time you join that room. Room owners and admins can override this with a forced background or disable user customisation entirely — see Room Settings.

changes.title: Per-closet color tints
changes.description: While inside a DM room the Style tab shows a Closet Tint section with 8 colour tints (Violet, Rose, Sky, Amber, Emerald, Pink, Slate, None). The tint is applied as a background rgba overlay with a matching left border on the messages panel. Stored locally under cp2p_closet_tint_{dmRoom}.

changes.title: Ring picker card UI with live animated preview
changes.description: The avatar ring picker uses card components instead of plain circles. Each card shows your actual avatar photo inside a live-animated ring preview — the same CSS keyframes used in chat — so what you see in the picker is exactly what others will see. A checkmark badge marks the active selection.

changes.title: Room appearance permissions for owners and admins
changes.description: A new Appearance Permissions section in Room Settings lets owners and admins control the background experience. Toggling 'Allow user-side custom backgrounds' off blocks members from changing the room background from their own Style tab. Choosing a forced background preset overrides every user's preference so everyone sees the same gradient. Both settings are stored in the room's settings.json under the appearance field.
